title: ReactionChange lacks #[non_exhaustive]
description: ReactionChange enum in src/methods/mod.rs:166-176 is not marked #[non_exhaustive]. If the JMAP Chat spec adds a new reaction operation variant (e.g., Replace, Clear) in a future version, callers with exhaustive match arms will silently miss the new variant, causing runtime failures instead of compile-time errors. This breaks forward compatibility and makes spec evolution dangerous. Mitigation: add #[non_exhaustive] to ReactionChange and increase MSRV documentation to warn maintainers.
close_reason: Added #[non_exhaustive] to ReactionChange enum in mod.rs
